Reply from Claude Team <no-reply@email.claude.com>: Introducing Claude Opus 4.6 and agent teams
Try our most intelligent model yet and enjoy $50 in extra usage.



 
<http://anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-6?utm_source=it&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=model-launch&utm_term=claude_code>



We're introducing Claude Opus 4.6—our most intelligent model yet, and the 
world’s best model for coding. We’re also introducing agent teams, a new 
feature in preview for speeding up your coding workflows.



Here’s what’s launching on Claude Code:

 * Claude Opus 4.6: The latest version of our most intelligent model, and the 
world’s best model for coding, enterprise agents, and professional work. 
Available now as the default model in Claude Code.
 * Agent teams (research preview): Claude Code can now parallelize tasks 
across multiple agents that communicate peer-to-peer. Note that running 
multiple agents may increase token usage proportionately. Agent teams are off 
by default and can be enabled in user settings.Learn more 
<https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-teams?utm_source=it&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=model-launch&utm_term=claude_code>
. 
 * $50 of extra usage: We’re giving $50 in extra usage 
<https://support.claude.com/en/articles/13613973-claude-opus-4-6-extra-usage-promo?utm_source=it&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=model-launch&utm_term=claude_code>
 to current* Pro and Max users so you can try out the latest features in Claude 
Code and Claude apps. This will automatically be added to your account if you 
haveextra usage enabled 
<https://claude.ai/settings/usage?utm_source=it&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=model-launch&utm_term=claude_code>
. 


Read blog  
<http://anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-6?utm_source=it&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=model-launch&utm_term=claude_code>



 Claude Opus 4.6 is now available in Claude Code. To learn more, check out the 
Claude Code docs 
<https://code.claude.com/docs/en/overview?utm_source=it&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=model-launch&utm_term=claude_code>
.



* To be eligible, you need to be a Pro or Max subscriber before Wednesday, Feb 
4, 11:59pm PT.




 <https://www.anthropic.com/?utm_source=email>

 <https://x.com/claudeai>  <https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/claude/> 
<https://www.youtube.com/@anthropic-ai>



 



This email was sent to o3.pro.user.3@gmail.com. To opt out of future emails, 
clickunsubscribe 
<https://links.email.claude.com/s/u/Sak60VHpl2ZS2kDwCOoBLfTL6HbYqrKeMTLLPjaC9oUiGIua2p293FZMGVKaXSRWn3np2pm6EBvpf0XZMn4jviNlWLxNJXi7cRze32Dv1SrQ01WW6JFjtba6qfeE9s2Zvd-bC7m7QZtdk6A-B15vb2u00X1XU2iznVySGTuwrSD-_xPqo9hEimyw03YUkPDrPhaZ0sNOnKJCAZ1b/bxFBJgZazR9uHaDAd8A_4yPjIVJngYFD/17>

Reply from Claude Team <no-reply@email.claude.com>: New in Claude Code: Sonnet 4.6, desktop app upgrades, and more
Here's what's new  Get even more out of Claude Code with these 
updates.͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏͏ 

 <https://claude.ai/code?utm_content=image_link> 

Here's what's new


We just released Claude Sonnet 4.6 
<https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-4-6?utm_content=inline_link>, our 
most capable Sonnet model yet with frontier performance across coding, agents, 
and professional work at scale. Sonnet 4.6 excels in iterative development work 
like building features and refactoring. It's available now in Claude Code.

See what else is new in Claude Code to help you build from anywhere.


 
<https://claude.com/blog/preview-review-and-merge-with-claude-code?utm_content=image_link>
Upgrades to Claude Code on desktop

New features for the Claude desktop app 
<https://code.claude.com/docs/en/desktop-quickstart?utm_content=inline_link> 
help you close the development loop without leaving Claude Code. You can now 
write, review, and verify code (plus monitor your open pull requests), all in 
the desktop app.

Learn more 
<https://claude.com/blog/preview-review-and-merge-with-claude-code?utm_content=inline_link>


 <https://code.claude.com/docs/en/fast-mode?utm_content=image_link> 
Fast mode for Opus 4.6 (research preview)

Use a 2.5x-faster version of Opus 4.6 at a higher cost per token with fast 
mode.

Toggle it on with /fast when you need speed for interactive work like rapid 
iteration or live debugging, and toggle it off when cost matters more than 
latency. Available for users with extra usage enabled.

Learn more <https://code.claude.com/docs/en/fast-mode?utm_content=inline_link>


 <https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-teams?utm_content=image_link> 
Agent teams (research preview)

Claude Code can now parallelize tasks across multiple agents that communicate 
peer-to-peer.

Note that running multiple agents may increase token usage proportionately. 
Agent teams are off by default and can be enabled in user settings.

Learn more 
<https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-teams?utm_content=inline_link>



Was this email useful?

 <https://form.typeform.com/to/Tvcv65tC?utm_content=feedback_up>  
<https://form.typeform.com/to/Tvcv65tC?utm_content=feedback_down> 

 <https://claude.ai?utm_content=footer_link> 
 <https://www.instagram.com/claudeai/>  
<https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/claude/>  <https://x.com/claudeai>  
<https://www.youtube.com/@anthropic-ai> 


Anthropic PBC, 548 Market St, PMB 90375, San Francisco, CA 94104

Updates to OpenAI's Privacy Policy

 Hello Bo Shang,

Here's what's changing:

*Finding friends on OpenAI services*
You can now choose to sync your contacts to see who else is using our services. This is completely optional.

*Ads*
Ads may appear on Free and Go plans.

Plus, Pro, Enterprise, Business and Education plans do not have ads.

Ads do not influence the answers ChatGPT gives you. When you see an ad, they are always clearly labeled as sponsored and visually separated from the organic answer.

You'll get relevant and personalized ads using information that stays only on ChatGPT, such as ads you've interacted with, or context from your chats. Hi there,

Codex is improving rapidly, so we’re starting a regular product update newsletter to help you keep up with what’s new and what’s worth trying.

*This week:* GPT-5.5 and major app upgrades make Codex useful beyond software engineering, while strengthening core coding workflows.

— The Codex team

Codex for (almost) everything

Powered by GPT-5.5, Codex can now complete more types of work across your computer:
